---
title: "Receiver Performance Report"
author: 'FathomR'
date: "2024-11-09"
output: html_document
params: 
  data_list: NULL
  #variables: NULL
  
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
data_list <- params$data_list
#variables <- params$variables
```


## Receiver Configuration Report

### Receiver configuration
```{r receiver metadata summary, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

receiver.meta <- cfg_channel %>%
  select(Serial, Model, `Map ID`) %>%
  left_join(event_init %>% select(Serial, `Firmware Version`))


receiver.meta %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl() %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

```{r receiver config, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
receiver.config.meta <- cfg_channel %>% 
  select(Serial, Model, `Map ID`) %>% 
  left_join(cfg_transmitter %>% select(Serial, Time, `Full ID`, `Power Level`, `Min Delay (s)`, `Max Delay (s)`), by = c('Serial'))
  

receiver.config.meta %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl() %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Receiver Clock Drift
```{r receiver clock ref, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

receiver.clock_ref <- clock_ref %>% 
  filter(Source == 'OFFLOAD') %>% 
  select(Serial, `Device Time (UTC)`, `External Time (UTC)`, `External Difference (s)`, Source)

receiver.clock_ref %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl() %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Receiver Issues
```{r receiver firmware events, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
rec.events <- event %>%
  select(Serial, `Device Time (UTC)`, Type, Description)

rec.events %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl() %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Receiver Offload
```{r receiver offload, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
event_offload %>% 
  select(Serial, `Device Time (UTC)`, `External Time (UTC)`, `External Time Zone`, `PPM Total Accepted Detections`,
         `Battery Remaining (%)`, `Memory Remaining (%)`) %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl() %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()

```

## Detection Summaries

### Internal Transmitter Detection Summary
```{r dets, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, message=FALSE}

internal_Tx <- receiver.config.meta$`Full ID`

int.Tx.dets <- det %>% 
  filter(`Full ID` %in% internal_Tx)

animal.dets <- det %>% 
  filter(!`Full ID` %in% internal_Tx)

int.Tx.dets %>% 
  group_by(Serial, `Full ID`) %>% 
  summarise(count = n()) %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl() %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()

ggplot(int.Tx.dets)+
  geom_bar(aes(as.factor(Serial)))+
  labs(x = 'Serial', y='Detection Count', title ='Internal Transmitter Detection Count')

```

### Animal Detection Summary
```{r animal det summary, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE}

animal.dets %>% 
  group_by(Serial) %>% 
  summarise(count = n()) %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl() %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()


ggplot(animal.dets)+
  geom_bar(aes(y = as.factor(Serial)))+
  labs(x = 'Serial', y='Detection Count', title ='Internal Transmitter Detection Count')

ggplot(animal.dets)+
  geom_bar(aes(y=as.factor(`Full ID`)))+
  labs(y='Detection Count', title = 'Animal Detection Count')



```
